* **From Simple to Complex:**  Synthesis methods have become increasingly complex, involving multiple steps and specialized equipment. This has made it more difficult for illicit labs to keep up, but it has also led to the development of more sophisticated clandestine operations.
* **From Bulk to Targeted Production:**  The focus has shifted from large-scale production of bulk drugs to more targeted synthesis of specific compounds, often tailored to evade detection.
